basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA) Plumber Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IGRUA. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IGRUA Plumber Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years as on 01-06-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 8th class pass with level-3 NSQF certificate and one year experience OR ITI in respective field with two years experience OR 8th class pass with five years experience
qualification.details: 8th class pass with level-3 certificate confirming to National Skill Qualifications framework with one year experience. ITI in respective field with two years experience. 8th class pass with five years experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IGRUA Plumber Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.indira_gandhi_rashtriya_uran_akademi_igr: 8th class pass with level-3 NSQF certificate and one year experience OR ITI in respective field with two years experience OR 8th class pass with five years experience

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Plumber Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IGRUA Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IGRUA Plumber Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: 8th class pass with level-3 certificate confirming to National Skill Qualifications framework with one year experience. ITI in respective field with two years experience. 8th class pass with five years experience.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years as on 01-06-2026.

rows.event: Last Date of receipt of applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IGRUA Plumber Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IGRUA Plumber Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IGRUA Plumber Recruitment 2026 is 21st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Plumber post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 8th class with a Level-3 NSQF certificate and one year of experience, or possess an ITI in the respective field with two years of experience, or have passed the 8th class with five years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Plumber position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Plumber post is 45 years as of 1st June 2026. Age relaxation details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Plumber post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Plumber post will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IGRUA Plumber Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach required documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Plumber post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Plumber post in the Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Plumber role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Plumber position will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi located?
faq.answer: The Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi is located in Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 229302.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity for the Plumber post at Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi.
